violations.text: Ambient temperature of the walk-in cooler observed at 43 degrees F. Food products observed with temperatures of 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. During inspection ambient temperature decreased to 41 degrees F. Service call placed. Product temperatures are to be closely monitored and moved to properly functioning units if needed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023

A couple of working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023
Door of the walk-in cooler is not in good repair. It does not close properly and must be repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023
The condensate from the oven unit observed draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain properly. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023
